facts.statement: DNS translates hostnames to IP addresses
SSH provides secure remote command-line access
facts.questionHint: What is SSH mainly used for?

definitions.definition: Translates private IP addresses to public addresses for external communication

procedures.title: Basic connectivity troubleshooting
steps: Verify the physical or wireless connection
procedures.outcome: Confirms where network connectivity is failing

scenarios.scenario: A user can reach internal apps but not external websites.
scenarios.bestAction: Check DNS resolution and upstream internet connectivity.

facts.statement: Multi-factor authentication adds a second factor beyond a password
facts.questionHint: What is the primary purpose of multi-factor authentication?
facts.answer: Add a second factor beyond a password

facts.statement: Security keys are a phishing-resistant MFA method

definitions.definition: A social engineering attack that tricks users into revealing credentials or sensitive data

procedures.title: Respond to a suspicious email report
steps: Capture the sender, links, and affected user details
Warn the user not to click further links
Escalate to the security process or team
procedures.outcome: Preserves evidence and starts incident handling quickly

scenarios.scenario: A user reports repeated MFA prompts they did not initiate.
scenarios.bestAction: Treat it as potential MFA fatigue and secure the account immediately.
distractors: Tell the user to keep approving prompts until they stop.
Ignore it because MFA prompts are normal.
Delete the user's browser history and close the ticket.
